creator: fabianruch@bsdgroup.de
text:
In doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/book.sgml (r1.973) I
noticed a few punctuation and spelling mistakes. For further information
see attached patch file.

Fix: 

Apply attached patch to the source file.
How-To-Repeat: Have a look at FreeBSD's detailed documentation.
